---
title: "solutions"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
reactions <- read.csv2("data/Czas reakcji.csv")
```

```{r}
head(reactions)
```

```{r}
summary(reactions)
```

```{r}
library(tidyr)
```

```{r}
reactions_long <- 
  reactions %>% 
  mutate(id = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Reakcja_przed, Reakcja_po), names_to = "moment", values_to = "czas")
```

```{r}
head(reactions_long)
```

```{r}
aggregate(czas ~ moment, reactions_long, mean)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
reactions_long %>% group_by(moment) %>% summarise(sredni_czas = mean(czas))
  
```

```{r}
better_count <- reactions %>% filter(Reakcja_przed > Reakcja_po) %>% count()

better_count
```

```{r}
better_count/nrow(reactions)
```

```{r}
difference <- reactions %>% mutate(roznica = Reakcja_po - Reakcja_przed)

summary(difference)
```

```{r}
difference %>% arrange(desc(roznica)) %>% head(3)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = reactions_long, mapping = aes(x = moment, y = czas, group = id)) + geom_line(alpha=0.3) + geom_point()
```
